title: First steps with Python
body: Today I wrote my very first script and it printed hello.

title: Reading files
body: Files are just text on disk that Python can open and read.

title: Loops save time
body: A for loop repeats work so you do not have to copy and paste.

title: What is an API
body: An API lets one program ask another program for data.

title: JSON is friendly
body: JSON looks just like Python lists and dicts which makes it easy.
